creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Mageirias!

Is there specific reason of introducing dependency upon net/libpcap?
We have it in base system, so the version from ports doesn't seems needed.


=======================<phase: package       >============================
===>  Building package for py35-pcapy-0.10.10
actual-package-depends: dependency on /usr/lib/libpcap.so not registered (normal if it belongs to base)
